# Max Weber

*1864 – 1920 · German*

German sociologist and political thinker: he defines the modern state by its monopoly on legitimate physical violence, and opposes the ethics of conviction to the ethics of responsibility, which owns the consequences of a measured use of force.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
